TO_HAND: Choose {Amount:plural:a card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
TO_TOP: Choose {Amount:plural:a card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} to put on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TO_APPLY: Choose {Amount:plural:a card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} to apply effects.
TO_STASIS: Choose {Amount:plural:a card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} to put into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
